film_room.headline: Touchdown drive
notes: The defense used front strength to constrain outside-zone looks.
The offense took underneath space conceded by safer coverage structure.
suggested_tweaks: Pair outside-zone tendency with play-action flood or bootleg counters.
If explosives are capped, increase efficient quick-game calls.
